overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along Vinewood Boulevard in Los Santos. The character travels from a sidewalk near the Eclipse Tower, crosses the street, and continues past various landmarks including the Tivoli Cinema and Spitroasters restaurant on a sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with retaining wall and commercial buildings

events.description: character crosses the multi-lane street from the right sidewalk to the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the right sidewalk past a retaining wall with tropical plants, then crossing the street between vehicles

notable_agents.action: red cola delivery truck driving along the road
woman in grey top and jeans walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall white art deco skyscraper dominating the skyline
building with pink facade and green awning signage
low black wall with tropical plants and flowers on top
tall palm trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a concrete sidewalk next to a black retaining wall with tropical plants. The Eclipse Tower is visible in the distance. The character walks forward, passes a woman pedestrian, and crosses the multi-lane street around the 13-second mark, navigating between a red delivery truck and a white sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with cinema and bus stop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the left sidewalk past various storefronts and groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing and conversing near a wall

entered.detail: large vintage-style cinema marquee sign with decorative lettering
blue and white glass bus shelter with metal frame
red and yellow patio umbrellas outside a sidewalk cafe
large billboard with colorful human figures and text

segments.scene_description: Now on the left side of the street, the character walks past a bus stop shelter and colorful patio umbrellas. The Tivoli Cinema sign is visible ahead on the right. The sidewalk is moderately busy with pedestrians, including a group standing near a wall. Various billboards and commercial signs line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with restaurant and office building

events.description: pedestrian in white hoodie runs past the character from behind and exits to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a street musician and approaching a restaurant with a distinctive red awning

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white hoodie and shorts running past from behind
street musician in yellow shirt playing acoustic guitar on building stairs

entered.detail: modern office building with large red 'For Lease' signage on facade
single-story restaurant with prominent red awning and signage
giant decorative coffee cup sign mounted on a tall pole

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past a modern office building with 'For Lease' signage. A pedestrian in a white hoodie runs past from behind. The character approaches the Spitroasters restaurant, identifiable by its large red awning and a giant decorative coffee cup sign. A street musician plays guitar on the stairs of a building on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling urban boulevard that transitions from a quiet sidewalk near a skyscraper to a vibrant commercial district. It begins on a concrete walkway beside a black retaining wall and tropical plants with the Eclipse Tower looming in the distance, moving forward past a pedestrian before crossing a multi-lane street between a red delivery truck and a white sports car. As the camera reaches the opposite side of the road, the environment opens up into a lively streetscape featuring a bus stop shelter, colorful patio umbrellas, and the prominent sign of the Tivoli Cinema. The scene then shifts past a modern office building with lease signage and a running pedestrian, finally approaching the Spitroasters restaurant with its large red awning and giant coffee cup sign while a street musician plays guitar nearby.
